hooks.command: if [ "$ORCHESTRATOR_MODE" = "off" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Orchestrator mode] Delegate substantive work to subagents (planner, investigator, junior-dev-worktree, reviewer, build-and-test, refactorer, test-writer, gofer). Do not read source files to understand the codebase or analyze data yourself. Full spec: $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/orchestrator-notes.md"}}'
